refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns text stating if a geometry is valid, or a reason for invalidity.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns text stating if a geometry is valid, or if invalid a reason why.
Useful in combination with to generate a detailed report of invalid geometries and reasons.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: -- invalid bow-tie polygon SELECT ST_IsValidReason( 'POLYGON ((100 200, 100 100, 200 200, 200 100, 100 200))'::geometry) as validity_info; validity_info -------------------------- Self-intersection[150 150]
